moves.text: Hi! I am your English learning robot.
Today, we will meet some friends and learn magic body words.
This is Ginger. Ginger is brave.
This is Torob. Torob likes guessing.
This is Jojo. Jojo likes to help.
And this is Shila. Shila thinks carefully.
%student_name%, are you ready to help them?
The secret password is a body part. Then, what can the secret password be?
The friends look at each other.
They wait. Nothing. The crack is still closed.
It moves... but no... not nose!
The crack opens a little. Light comes out. Everyone is excited.
Ginger steps closer to the glowing crack. It sparkles and hums softly.
They hold their breath. The wall flickers just a tiny bit.
Great! Now let us practice the magic body words.
Great practice! You finished the magic body words.

moves.html:
Fast Picture Game

You will see three pictures.

Listen to the robot.

Then choose A, B, or C.

Press START when you are ready.

moves.text: Now let's play the fast picture game. Look at the pictures and choose A, B, or C. Press start when you are ready.

moves.html:
Find: EYE

Touch eye.

Find: EAR

Touch ear.

Find: NOSE

Touch nose.

Find: MOUTH

Touch mouth.

moves.text: Great! This is the first half of the Kahoot game.

moves.html:
Picture Game Part 2

Now there are four pictures.

Listen to the robot.

Choose A, B, C, or D.

moves.text: Now let's play part two. There are four pictures. Choose A, B, C, or D.

moves.html:
Find: LIPS

Touch lips.

moves.prompt: Choose A, B, C, or D

moves.html:
Find: TOES

Touch toes.

moves.prompt: Choose A, B, C, or D

moves.html:
Find: FACE

Touch face.

moves.prompt: Choose A, B, C, or D

moves.html:
Find: EAR

Touch ear.

moves.prompt: Choose A, B, C, or D

moves.text: Great! You finished part two of the picture game.
Amazing! You earned your magic hearts.

moves.html:
Do It Fast!

Listen to the robot.

Touch the body part as fast as you can.

After a few seconds, the picture will appear.

Then your helper will reveal the magic password.

Press START when you are ready.

moves.text: Now it is time for Do It Fast. Listen carefully. Touch the body part as fast as you can. Then the picture will appear.
Before we start, choose a friend to help you in the fast game.

moves.html:
Choose your helper

Who will play with you?

GINGER
TOROB
JOJO
SHILA
KOKO
SIMO

helper_ginger.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

helper_torob.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

helper_jojo.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

helper_shila.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

helper_koko.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

helper_simo.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

moves.text: Your magic word is Shoulder. Say it to Ginger next week to open the crack!
Keep the password secret. Great work today. Goodbye!
